source_metadata.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]
source_metadata.author: BerriAI

content.raw: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]
content.summary: LiteLLM是一个Python SDK和代理服务器（AI网关），提供统一接口调用100+个LLM API（包括OpenAI、Azure、Bedrock、VertexAI、Anthropic等），支持OpenAI格式或原生格式调用，具备成本跟踪、防护机制、负载均衡和日志记录功能。
key_points: 统一接口调用100+ LLM API
提供成本跟踪和负载均衡
内置防护机制和日志记录
可作为代理服务器部署
